name: Chinatown Roast Pork
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork Loin, Boned and Tied
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining minced garlic, soy sauce, bourbon whiskey, molasses, Chinese oyster sauce, and crushed star anise in a large bowl.
2. Place the pork loin in a heavy plastic food storage bag and pour the marinade over the meat, ensuring it is well coated.
3. Seal the bag and refrigerate for 3 to 8 hours, or longer for best results.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Remove the marinated pork from the bag and place on a roasting rack in a roasting pan.
6. Roast until a meat thermometer inserted into the center of the roast reads 170 degrees Fahrenheit (about 1 3/4 hours).
7. Let the roast stand for 30 minutes before carving.
8. Slice the pork very thin and serve warm or at room temperature with Chinese-style mustard, rice, noodles, and stir-fried snow peas.
